articles.title: 3 takeaways from the Revolution’s 2-1 win over Minnesota United
articles.description:
"Give Matt Turner some credit. He made some really good saves for them."

The post 3 takeaways from the Revolution’s 2-1 win over Minnesota United appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Revolution secured a 2-1 victory against Minnesota United on May 16, 2026.
Goalkeeper Matt Turner made crucial saves, contributing to the team's success.
This win boosts the Revolution's standings, enhancing local fan engagement and support.

articles.title: SNL recap: Best moments from Will Ferrell hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’ season finale
articles.description:
Will Ferrell hosted the season 51 finale of "Saturday Night Live" on May 16, with Paul McCartney serving as musical guest.

The post SNL recap: Best moments from Will Ferrell hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’ season finale appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Will Ferrell hosted SNL's season 51 finale on May 16, 2026.
Paul McCartney performed as the musical guest during the finale.
Local viewers enjoyed a night of comedy and music from iconic entertainers.
